title: refactor architecture
body: Convert ARCHITECTURE.json from the legacy $schema:c4 id/role child-tree to the canonical columns/tree schema (schemaVersion 2.0, kind architecture-tree). Added name/detail/columns, renamed dotted ids to unique kebab-case, decomposed the two giant role paragraphs (named-candidate-dft H_019..H_030 narrative; verification cards H_001..H_028 narrative) into one-fact child nodes (95 nodes total, every cell <=300 chars, no piling, no history nodes). Lossless: all 127 distinctive source tokens preserved. Copied canonical viewer to architecture.html (SRC ARCHITECTURE.json). architecture lint: ok.
